bank.retain_mission: Extract project plans, milestones, dependencies, risks, decisions, and outcomes captured by project managers and shepherds.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about teams, cadences, definitions of done, escalation paths, and recurring risk patterns. Ignore one-off ticket churn.

mental_models.name: Delivery Plan
mental_models.source_query: What is the current plan? Milestones, dependencies, owners, and confidence.

mental_models.name: Risk Register
mental_models.source_query: What risks recur and what mitigations have actually worked?
